brochures.title: St. Louis - Art Bound
brochures.description: Step inside the 2025 Official Visitors Guide and see the city come alive. From bold flavors in local breweries to breathtaking art performances, this is your pass to everything St. Louis has to offer.

brochures.title: Destination Maryland. Official Travel Magazine
brochures.description: Having lasting memories from your vacation makes all the planning so worth it. Maryland is home to a variety of sights and adventures. You'll find amazing waterscapes, from mountain streams to rivers, the Chesapeake Bay, and more.

brochures.title: Fairbanks Official Visitors Guide
brochures.description: Start your Alaska adventure with the 2025 Fairbanks guide. Aurora viewing, hot springs, sled-dog races, midnight sun hikes and cultural centers - the gateway to the North.

brochures.title: Tour Arizona - Scenic Trails
brochures.description: From Sedona's red rocks to the Grand Canyon's rim, discover Arizona's most breathtaking drives and hikes - with maps, pit-stops and insider tips for every season.

passes.title: Museum Pass
passes.tagline: Skip the line at 8 iconic museums.

activities.title: Cheyenne Depot Museum
activities.description: Designated a National Historic Landmark, this former Union Pacific Depot has been restored to its original glory. Home to a visitor center and restaurant, the Depot also features the Cheyenne Depot Museum, rich with railroad history, exhibits and interactive displays, including an intricate working model.

activities.title: Heard Museum
activities.description: The Heard Museum advances American Indian art by presenting the stories of American Indian people from a first-person perspective. Founded in 1929, the Heard is internationally recognized for the quality of its collections and educational programming.

activities.title: Phoenix Art Museum
activities.description: The largest art museum in the Southwestern United States, Phoenix Art Museum features a collection of more than 20,000 works of American, Asian, European, Latin American, Western American, modern and contemporary art.

activities.title: Musical Instrument Museum
activities.description: MIM is the world's only global musical instrument museum, offering guests a rich musical journey with nearly 7,000 instruments on display from around 200 countries and territories across the globe.

activities.title: Desert Botanical Museum
activities.description: A living museum with over 50,000 desert plants across 140 acres. Walk through immersive themed trails, see rare cactus species in bloom and explore desert wildlife exhibits. Year-round indoor and outdoor exhibitions.

activities.title: Arizona Science Center
activities.description: Four floors of hands-on science exhibits, a planetarium and a five-story IMAX theater. Perfect for all ages, featuring rotating special exhibits on space, biology and technology.

activities.title: Scottsdale Museum of the West
activities.description: Smithsonian-affiliated museum celebrating the art, history and culture of the American West. Permanent collection of over 800 works by leading Western artists, plus rotating exhibitions.

activities.title: Children's Museum of Phoenix
activities.description: Three floors of interactive exhibits designed for kids under 10. Featuring the iconic Noodle Forest, the Schuff-Perini Climber and dozens of hands-on learning stations.

activities.title: Red Bus City Tour
activities.description: Hop-on hop-off double decker bus tour with 12 stops at the city's top landmarks. Audio guide available in 8 languages. Tickets valid 24 hours from first boarding.

activities.title: Historic Walking Tour
activities.description: Two-hour guided walking tour through the historic downtown district. Learn about the architecture, culture and hidden gems from our expert local guides. Small groups, max 12 people.

activities.title: Sunset River Cruise
activities.description: 90-minute narrated cruise along the river at sunset. Complimentary drink included. Live music on Friday and Saturday evenings. Reservation recommended.

activities.title: All-day Bike Rental
activities.description: Full-day cruiser bike rental from 8am to 8pm. Helmet, lock and city map included. Perfect for exploring the riverfront trail and downtown.

activities.title: Helicopter City Tour
activities.description: 30-minute scenic helicopter ride with panoramic views of the skyline, landmarks and surrounding mountains. Up to 4 passengers per flight. Weather-dependent.

activities.title: Old Town Trolley Ride
activities.description: Ride the historic trolley through Old Town with live narration from a costumed guide. 45-minute loop with 6 stops at museums, art galleries and the farmer's market.

activities.title: Night Photography Tour
activities.description: 2.5-hour guided night walk through the best-lit spots in the city. Professional photographer teaches long-exposure and low-light techniques. Tripod provided.

activities.title: Desert Jeep Safari
activities.description: 3-hour off-road jeep adventure into the Sonoran Desert. Stops at ancient petroglyph sites, cactus forests and a sunset overlook. Snacks and water included.

passes.title: Food & Drink Pass
passes.tagline: Taste the best of the city in 10 stops.

activities.title: Daddy of the Malt
activities.description: Craft brewery and tasting room with rotating selection of 16 house beers. Your pass includes a flight of 4 beers of your choice. Kid-friendly patio with lawn games.

activities.title: Farm to Table Bistro
activities.description: Seasonal menu sourced from local farms. Your pass gets you a complimentary appetizer with any entrée. Reservations recommended for dinner.

activities.title: Central Coffee Roasters
activities.description: Award-winning coffee roaster and café. Pass includes a 12oz specialty drink of your choice. Bean tours available on weekends.

activities.title: Nonna's Gelato
activities.description: Authentic Italian gelato made fresh daily from a family recipe. Your pass includes one regular-size cup or cone with two flavors.

activities.title: Steakhouse 44
activities.description: Classic American steakhouse with prime cuts and an extensive wine list. Pass gets you a complimentary glass of house wine with any entrée. Dress code smart-casual.

activities.title: Taco Alley
activities.description: 12 family-owned taquerías along a pedestrian alley. Pass includes a tasting flight of 3 signature tacos from any 3 stalls. Salsa bar included.

activities.title: Skyline Rooftop Bar
activities.description: Open-air rooftop bar with panoramic city views. Pass includes one signature craft cocktail. Live DJ Fridays and Saturdays. 21+ after 9pm.

activities.title: Chocolate & Wine Tasting
activities.description: Guided 90-minute pairing with 5 artisan chocolates and 5 local wines. Small groups of 12 in a cozy tasting room downtown. Daily at 3pm and 6pm.

activities.title: Sunrise Hot-Air Balloon
activities.description: Floating 1-hour ride at dawn over the Sonoran Desert with champagne toast on landing. Capacity 8 per basket. Weather-dependent.

activities.title: Canyon Zipline
activities.description: Four-line zipline course with the longest run at 1,500 ft. Full safety gear, guided by certified instructors. Ages 10+, weight 70-270 lbs.

activities.title: Indoor Rock Climbing
activities.description: 40+ routes from beginner to advanced. Pass covers gear rental (shoes, harness, chalk) and intro lesson. Bouldering area included.

activities.title: Lake Kayak Rental
activities.description: Two-hour kayak rental on Saguaro Lake. Single or tandem. Life vests and paddle included. Launch dock open 7am-5pm.

activities.title: ATV Desert Tour
activities.description: Two-hour guided ATV ride through desert washes and ridge lines. Helmets and goggles provided. Minimum age 16 with valid license.

activities.title: Tandem Skydive
activities.description: 13,000 ft tandem jump with certified instructor. 60-second free fall, 5-minute canopy ride. Video and photo package available.

passes.title: Wellness Pass
passes.tagline: Reset and recharge across 6 spa experiences.

activities.title: Desert Hot Springs
activities.description: Access to mineral hot springs pools and cold plunge. Pass includes towel service and one herbal tea. Open 7am-10pm daily.

activities.title: Swedish Massage
activities.description: 60-minute full-body Swedish massage with aromatherapy. Licensed therapists. Includes use of sauna and steam room before or after session.

activities.title: Sunrise Yoga Flow
activities.description: 75-minute vinyasa flow class with outdoor deck view. All levels welcome. Mats and props provided. Classes Mon-Sat at 7am.

activities.title: Sound Bath Meditation
activities.description: 45-minute guided meditation with crystal singing bowls and gongs. Perfect for stress relief. Reserved cushions provided.

activities.title: Signature Facial
activities.description: 60-minute customized facial with steam, exfoliation and mask. Licensed estheticians select products for your skin type.

activities.title: Himalayan Salt Cave
activities.description: 45-minute halotherapy session in a zero-gravity lounger surrounded by Himalayan salt walls. Known to support respiratory health.

passes.title: Family Pass
passes.tagline: 6 attractions the whole family will love.

activities.title: Phoenix Zoo Admission
activities.description: General admission for up to 2 adults and 2 kids. 1,200+ animals across 125 acres. Includes Safari Train ride and Monkey Village.

activities.title: OdySea Aquarium
activities.description: 2-million-gallon aquarium with 65 exhibits featuring sharks, rays, otters and penguins. Pass covers the rotating shark cage experience.

activities.title: Sky Zone Trampoline Park
activities.description: 90 minutes of open jump plus dodgeball court, foam pit and ninja warrior course. Grip socks required (sold on site).

activities.title: Castle Mini Golf
activities.description: Two 18-hole courses through a medieval castle theme. Arcade tokens included with the pass. Open until 10pm weekends.

activities.title: Ice Den Skating Rink
activities.description: Public skate session (90 min) with skate rental included. Snack bar on site. Sessions daily at 11am, 2pm and 5pm.

activities.title: Big Surf Waterpark
activities.description: Full-day access to 20+ slides, lazy river and America's original wave pool. Cabana upgrades available. Summer season only (May-Sept).

trails.title: Camelback Mountain (Echo Canyon)
trails.address: 5700 N Echo Canyon Pkwy, Phoenix, AZ 85018
trails.description: Iconic Phoenix summit hike. Echo Canyon trail is steep and technical with handrails and boulder scrambles. Stunning 360° views from the top. Bring more water than you think you need — this trail has no shade and becomes dangerous in hot weather.

directions.instruction: Head northeast on E Camelback Rd
Turn right onto N Echo Canyon Pkwy
Arrive at Echo Canyon trailhead parking

trails.title: Piestewa Peak Summit Trail
trails.address: 2701 E Squaw Peak Dr, Phoenix, AZ 85016
trails.description: Popular Phoenix Mountains Preserve summit. Steep and rocky with stone steps the whole way up. Expect crowds on weekends. Great sunrise/sunset views of the Valley of the Sun.

directions.instruction: Take AZ-51 S to exit 5
Turn right onto E Squaw Peak Dr
Arrive at Piestewa Peak trailhead

trails.title: South Mountain National Trail
trails.description: Traverse the full length of South Mountain Park — one of the largest municipal parks in the US. Point-to-point hike with dramatic ridgelines and saguaro-studded valleys. Arrange a shuttle or second vehicle.

directions.instruction: Head south on I-10 W, exit 22
Right onto S Central Ave
Arrive at Pima Canyon trailhead

trails.title: Tom's Thumb Trail
trails.description: Scottsdale's iconic granite thumb-shaped formation. Steep climb with world-class rock scenery — popular with climbers. Wildflower bloom in spring is incredible.

directions.instruction: Take AZ-101 Loop N to exit 38
Right on N 128th St
Arrive at trailhead parking

trails.title: Hidden Valley Loop
trails.description: Gentle loop through the red sandstone formations of Papago Park. Great for families and first-time desert hikers. Kids love the natural stone arches and the climb up to the Hole-in-the-Rock viewpoint.

directions.instruction: Head east on E Van Buren St
Right on N Galvin Pkwy
Arrive at Papago Park

trails.title: Papago Butte Loop
trails.description: Short loop around the central butte of Papago Park. Perfect morning walk with views of the Phoenix Zoo, Desert Botanical Garden, and downtown skyline.

directions.instruction: Take E Van Buren St east
Left into Papago Park
Park near the butte

trails.description: Sprawling Sonoran Desert preserve. This loop covers representative terrain with saguaros, ironwoods, and seasonal washes. Bring binoculars for bird watching.

directions.instruction: Take AZ-101 Loop N

Arrive at Gateway Access Area

trails.title: Pinnacle Peak Trail
trails.description: Well-maintained desert trail with interpretive signs, restrooms, and shaded benches. Watch for rock climbers on the pinnacle. Great family-friendly moderate hike.

directions.instruction: Take AZ-101 Loop N to Pima Rd

trails.title: Lost Dog Wash Trail
trails.description: Shaded wash hike along the McDowell foothills. The riparian sections see higher wildlife activity at dawn and dusk.

directions.instruction: Take AZ-101 Loop N
Right on N 124th St
Arrive at Lost Dog Wash trailhead

trails.address: 3939 N Usery Pass Rd, Mesa, AZ 85207
trails.description: Moderately challenging hike to a large wind-carved cave with panoramic views. Park entry fee required. Start early in summer — exposure is significant.

directions.instruction: Take US-60 E to Ellsworth Rd

trails.address: 18333 N Thompson Peak Pkwy, Scottsdale, AZ 85255
trails.description: Classic McDowell Sonoran loop. Well-marked, scenic and accessible with gentle grades. Excellent trail running route.

directions.instruction: Take AZ-101 Loop N to Thompson Peak

trails.description: Hidden local favorite in Cave Creek. Short but steep summit with outstanding views north to the Bradshaw Mountains.

directions.instruction: Take I-17 N to Carefree Hwy

directions.instruction: Take I-10 W to Olive Ave

directions.instruction: Take AZ-51 N to Northern Ave

askAi.greeting: Hi! I'm your guide to {client_name}. Ask me anything about restaurants, events, activities, or getting around the area.

suggestedQuestions.response: Great choice! For fine dining, Harbor Grill on the waterfront serves incredible Pacific seafood with sunset views. If you're craving something unique, Gowoondon on San Diego Ave is the go-to for authentic Korean barbecue. Both are within a mile of here and highly rated by visitors.

Today in San Diego you can catch the CRSSD Festival at Waterfront Park — it's a two-day electronic music event with international DJs. There's also a food truck gathering at Balboa Park and a sunset yoga session at La Jolla Shores. Want me to add any of these to your itinerary?

I'd love to help! Here's a perfect San Diego day: Start with coffee at Bird Rock Coffee in La Jolla, head to Balboa Park for the museums, grab lunch at Harbor Grill, explore the Gaslamp Quarter in the afternoon, and finish with cocktails at Raised by Wolves. I can customize this based on your interests!

San Diego has several great options. The MTS Trolley connects downtown to Old Town, Mission Valley, and the border. Ride-sharing is widely available. For the beaches, the bus Route 30 runs along the coast. Many attractions downtown are walkable, and you can rent electric scooters on almost every corner.

suggestedQuestions.text: Things to do near the waterfront?
suggestedQuestions.response: The waterfront is packed! Visit the USS Midway Museum — it's an aircraft carrier turned museum right on the bay. Seaport Village has shops and restaurants with harbor views. You can take a harbor cruise, rent kayaks, or just walk the Embarcadero path. The Headquarters at Seaport is great for shopping too.

Right now it's a beautiful 72F and sunny — typical San Diego weather! The forecast shows clear skies all week with temperatures between 68-75F. Perfect for outdoor activities. UV is moderate, so sunscreen is recommended if you're heading to the beach. Evening temperatures drop to around 60F.

The Gaslamp Quarter is the heart of San Diego nightlife — dozens of bars, clubs, and lounges within a few blocks. For something special, try Raised by Wolves, a hidden speakeasy behind a bottle shop. Pacific Beach has a more casual, beachy vibe. North Park is the craft beer capital with 20+ breweries.

Bird Rock Coffee Roasters in La Jolla is award-winning — they roast their own beans on-site. In North Park, try Dark Horse Coffee Roasters for great espresso and pastries. Downtown, James Coffee Co. has a beautiful space in a converted warehouse. All three source directly from farms for exceptional quality.

articles.question: How do I get around the app?
articles.answer: Use the bottom navigation bar to switch between Home, Events, Dining, Map and More. From the Home dashboard you can tap any tile to open a module, and the search icon lets you find places and events across {client_name}.

articles.question: How do I save my favorites?
articles.answer: Tap the heart icon on any listing, restaurant or place to add it to your favorites. You can review everything you've saved later from your profile and favorites section.

articles.question: How do I get directions to a place?
articles.answer: Open any place or listing and tap “See Directions”. The app opens turn-by-turn directions in your maps application using the destination's location.

articles.question: Why isn't my location showing on the map?
articles.answer: Make sure location permissions are enabled for your browser or device. Without location access the map still works, but distances and your current position may not appear.

articles.question: How do I edit my profile?
articles.answer: Go to More → My Profile and tap “Edit Profile”. From there you can update your name, photo and personal details, and save your changes.

articles.question: How do I reset my password?
articles.answer: On the login screen tap “Forgot Password”, enter your email, and follow the instructions we send you to set a new password.

articles.question: Is there Wi-Fi available?
articles.answer: Many locations across {client_name} offer complimentary Wi-Fi. Look for the Wi-Fi feature tag on a listing, or ask the front desk or information staff for the network and password.

articles.question: Where can I park?
articles.answer: Listings that offer parking show a Parking tag in their details. Use the filters on any module to show only places with parking, and tap “See Directions” to navigate to the entrance.

es.help.articles.0.answer: Usa la barra de navegación inferior para cambiar entre Inicio, Eventos, Gastronomía, Mapa y Más. Desde el panel de Inicio puedes tocar cualquier mosaico para abrir un módulo, y el icono de búsqueda te permite encontrar lugares y eventos en todo {client_name}.
es.help.articles.1.answer: Toca el icono de corazón en cualquier listado, restaurante o lugar para añadirlo a tus favoritos. Luego puedes revisar todo lo que guardaste desde tu perfil y la sección de favoritos.
es.help.articles.2.answer: Abre cualquier lugar o listado y toca «Cómo llegar». La app abre indicaciones paso a paso en tu aplicación de mapas usando la ubicación del destino.
es.help.articles.3.answer: Asegúrate de que los permisos de ubicación estén activados en tu navegador o dispositivo. Sin acceso a la ubicación el mapa sigue funcionando, pero las distancias y tu posición actual pueden no aparecer.
es.help.articles.4.answer: Ve a Más → Mi perfil y toca «Editar perfil». Desde ahí puedes actualizar tu nombre, foto y datos personales, y guardar los cambios.
es.help.articles.5.answer: En la pantalla de inicio de sesión toca «Olvidé mi contraseña», escribe tu correo y sigue las instrucciones que te enviamos para establecer una nueva contraseña.
es.help.articles.6.answer: Muchos lugares en todo {client_name} ofrecen Wi-Fi gratuito. Busca la etiqueta de Wi-Fi en un listado, o pregunta en recepción o al personal de información por la red y la contraseña.
es.help.articles.7.answer: Los listados con estacionamiento muestran una etiqueta de Estacionamiento en sus detalles. Usa los filtros de cualquier módulo para mostrar solo lugares con estacionamiento, y toca «Cómo llegar» para llegar a la entrada.

fr.help.articles.0.answer: Utilisez la barre de navigation inférieure pour basculer entre Accueil, Événements, Restauration, Carte et Plus. Depuis le tableau de bord d'accueil, touchez une tuile pour ouvrir un module, et l'icône de recherche vous permet de trouver des lieux et des événements dans tout {client_name}.
fr.help.articles.1.answer: Touchez l'icône en forme de cœur sur une annonce, un restaurant ou un lieu pour l'ajouter à vos favoris. Vous pourrez ensuite retrouver tout ce que vous avez enregistré depuis votre profil et la section favoris.
fr.help.articles.2.answer: Ouvrez un lieu ou une annonce et touchez « Itinéraire ». L'application ouvre un itinéraire détaillé dans votre application de cartes en utilisant la position de la destination.
fr.help.articles.3.answer: Assurez-vous que les autorisations de localisation sont activées pour votre navigateur ou appareil. Sans accès à la localisation, la carte fonctionne toujours, mais les distances et votre position actuelle peuvent ne pas s'afficher.
fr.help.articles.4.answer: Allez dans Plus → Mon profil et touchez « Modifier le profil ». Vous pourrez y mettre à jour votre nom, votre photo et vos informations personnelles, puis enregistrer les modifications.
fr.help.articles.5.answer: Sur l'écran de connexion, touchez « Mot de passe oublié », saisissez votre e-mail et suivez les instructions que nous vous envoyons pour définir un nouveau mot de passe.
fr.help.articles.6.answer: De nombreux lieux dans tout {client_name} proposent un Wi-Fi gratuit. Recherchez l'étiquette Wi-Fi sur une annonce, ou demandez le réseau et le mot de passe à la réception ou au personnel d'information.
fr.help.articles.7.answer: Les annonces proposant un parking affichent une étiquette Parking dans leurs détails. Utilisez les filtres de n'importe quel module pour n'afficher que les lieux avec parking, et touchez « Itinéraire » pour rejoindre l'entrée.

de.help.articles.0.answer: Nutze die untere Navigationsleiste, um zwischen Start, Veranstaltungen, Gastronomie, Karte und Mehr zu wechseln. Über das Start-Dashboard kannst du eine Kachel antippen, um ein Modul zu öffnen, und über das Suchsymbol findest du Orte und Veranstaltungen in ganz {client_name}.
de.help.articles.1.answer: Tippe auf das Herzsymbol bei einem Eintrag, Restaurant oder Ort, um ihn zu deinen Favoriten hinzuzufügen. Alles Gespeicherte findest du später in deinem Profil und im Favoritenbereich.
de.help.articles.2.answer: Öffne einen Ort oder Eintrag und tippe auf „Route anzeigen“. Die App öffnet eine Schritt-für-Schritt-Navigation in deiner Karten-App mit dem Standort des Ziels.
de.help.articles.3.answer: Stelle sicher, dass die Standortberechtigungen für deinen Browser oder dein Gerät aktiviert sind. Ohne Standortzugriff funktioniert die Karte weiterhin, aber Entfernungen und deine aktuelle Position werden möglicherweise nicht angezeigt.
de.help.articles.4.answer: Gehe zu Mehr → Mein Profil und tippe auf „Profil bearbeiten“. Dort kannst du deinen Namen, dein Foto und deine persönlichen Daten aktualisieren und die Änderungen speichern.
de.help.articles.5.answer: Tippe auf dem Anmeldebildschirm auf „Passwort vergessen“, gib deine E-Mail ein und folge den Anweisungen, die wir dir senden, um ein neues Passwort festzulegen.
de.help.articles.6.answer: Viele Orte in ganz {client_name} bieten kostenloses WLAN. Achte auf das WLAN-Merkmal bei einem Eintrag oder frage an der Rezeption bzw. beim Informationspersonal nach Netzwerk und Passwort.
de.help.articles.7.answer: Einträge mit Parkmöglichkeit zeigen in ihren Details ein Parken-Merkmal. Nutze die Filter in einem beliebigen Modul, um nur Orte mit Parkplatz anzuzeigen, und tippe auf „Route anzeigen“, um zum Eingang zu navigieren.

pt.help.articles.0.answer: Use a barra de navegação inferior para alternar entre Início, Eventos, Gastronomia, Mapa e Mais. No painel inicial, toque em qualquer bloco para abrir um módulo, e o ícone de busca permite encontrar lugares e eventos em todo o {client_name}.
pt.help.articles.1.answer: Toque no ícone de coração em qualquer listagem, restaurante ou lugar para adicioná-lo aos favoritos. Você pode rever tudo o que salvou depois, no seu perfil e na seção de favoritos.
pt.help.articles.2.answer: Abra qualquer lugar ou listagem e toque em "Ver rotas". O app abre rotas detalhadas no seu aplicativo de mapas usando a localização do destino.
pt.help.articles.3.answer: Verifique se as permissões de localização estão ativadas no seu navegador ou dispositivo. Sem acesso à localização o mapa ainda funciona, mas as distâncias e sua posição atual podem não aparecer.
pt.help.articles.4.answer: Vá para Mais → Meu perfil e toque em "Editar perfil". A partir daí você pode atualizar seu nome, foto e dados pessoais, e salvar as alterações.
pt.help.articles.5.answer: Na tela de login, toque em "Esqueci a senha", digite seu e-mail e siga as instruções que enviamos para definir uma nova senha.
pt.help.articles.6.answer: Muitos locais em todo o {client_name} oferecem Wi-Fi gratuito. Procure a etiqueta de Wi-Fi em uma listagem ou peça a rede e a senha na recepção ou à equipe de informações.
pt.help.articles.7.answer: As listagens que oferecem estacionamento exibem uma etiqueta de Estacionamento nos detalhes. Use os filtros de qualquer módulo para mostrar apenas lugares com estacionamento e toque em "Ver rotas" para chegar à entrada.

ja.help.contact.successTitle: メッセージを送信しました！
ja.help.contact.successBody: お問い合わせありがとうございます。チームよりまもなくご連絡いたします。
ja.help.articles.0.answer: 下部のナビゲーションバーでホーム、イベント、ダイニング、マップ、その他を切り替えます。ホーム画面では各タイルをタップしてモジュールを開けるほか、検索アイコンで{client_name}全域のスポットやイベントを探せます。
ja.help.articles.1.answer: リスト、レストラン、スポットのハート アイコンをタップするとお気に入りに追加できます。保存した内容は後でプロフィールとお気に入りセクションから確認できます。
ja.help.articles.2.answer: スポットやリストを開いて「ルートを見る」をタップします。目的地の位置情報を使って、お使いの地図アプリでターンバイターンのルートが開きます。
ja.help.articles.3.answer: ブラウザまたは端末で位置情報の許可が有効になっていることを確認してください。位置情報へのアクセスがなくても地図は使えますが、距離や現在地が表示されない場合があります。
ja.help.articles.4.answer: 「その他」→「マイプロフィール」を開き、「プロフィールを編集」をタップします。そこで名前、写真、個人情報を更新して変更を保存できます。
ja.help.articles.5.answer: ログイン画面で「パスワードをお忘れですか」をタップし、メールアドレスを入力して、お送りする手順に従って新しいパスワードを設定してください。
ja.help.articles.6.answer: {client_name}各地の多くの施設で無料Wi-Fiをご利用いただけます。リストのWi-Fi表示をご確認いただくか、フロントまたは案内スタッフにネットワーク名とパスワードをお尋ねください。
ja.help.articles.7.answer: 駐車場のあるリストには詳細に「駐車場」タグが表示されます。各モジュールのフィルターを使って駐車場のある場所だけを表示し、「ルートを見る」をタップして入口まで案内を受けてください。
